trust.source: the checked-out repository and its locked dependencies
trust.warning: Source launch executes repository JavaScript dependency lifecycle scripts and Rust build code. Review the repository before invoking an Agent Skill.

audit.sideEffect: writes only an explicitly requested audit file under .agent-runtime

launch.sideEffect: installs locked project dependencies when absent, builds generated code, and starts tauri dev

stop.sideEffect: stops only the identity-verified repository launcher process tree and removes its same-run state; an explicit recovery flag can remove corrupt state without terminating an unknown process

allowedByScripts: install locked dependencies into this project
use pnpm and Cargo user caches
start and inspect this repository's tauri dev process
stop only the identity-verified repository launcher process tree
requiresSeparateExplicitApproval: run winget, brew, apt, rustup, npm --global, pnpm --global, sudo, or an elevated installer
deniedBySkill: implicit execution when the repository is opened
pnpm tauri build or installer generation
release asset download as part of source launch
provider credential, cookie, storage, or profile access
automatic host rollback or toolchain uninstall
remote upload of logs or audit records

repositoryLocal.removal: manual; safe only when no project process is using it

repositoryLocal.when: the injected bridge bundle is built
repositoryLocal.removal: generated; recreated on the next launch

repositoryLocal.when: Cargo compiles the Tauri development app
repositoryLocal.removal: manual cargo clean; removes incremental build cache

repositoryLocal.when: audit, launch, status logging, or receipts are used
repositoryLocal.removal: manual after the repository launcher is stopped

userCaches: pnpm may populate its shared content-addressed store
Cargo may populate the user's registry, git, and compiler caches
applicationData: the running Tauri app may create its normal local settings and control-webview data
provider profiles are created only when the user opens providers and remain local
sideEffects.hostConfigurationByScripts: none; scripts do not install toolchains, modify PATH, elevate privileges, or weaken security settings
sideEffects.automaticRollback: none; shared toolchains, caches, and provider profiles must never be removed automatically

exitCodes.2: invalid command usage or contract data

privacy.credentials: never read by Agent lifecycle scripts
